examples.sentence: 天気予報に反して、今日は雨が降っている。
examples.translation: Contrary to the weather forecast, it is raining today.
examples.translationEn: Contrary to the weather forecast, it is raining today.
examples.romaji: Tenki yohou ni hanshite, kyou wa ame ga futte iru.

examples.sentence: 彼の予想に反して、試合に勝った。
examples.translation: We won the match against his prediction.
examples.translationEn: We won the match against his prediction.
examples.romaji: Kare no yosou ni hanshite, shiai ni katta.

examples.sentence: 両親の意見に反して、彼と結婚した。
examples.translation: I married him against my parents' opinion.
examples.translationEn: I married him against my parents' opinion.
examples.romaji: Ryoushin no iken ni hanshite, kare to kekkon shita.

examples.sentence: この映画は批評家の評価に反して大ヒットした。
examples.translation: This movie became a big hit contrary to the critics' ratings.
examples.translationEn: This movie became a big hit contrary to the critics' ratings.
examples.romaji: Kono eiga wa hihyouka no hyouka ni hanshite daihitto shita.

examples.sentence: 研究結果に基づいて、新しい治療法が開発されました。
examples.translation: A new treatment method was developed based on the research results.
examples.translationEn: A new treatment method was developed based on the research results.
examples.romaji: Kenkyuu kekka ni motozuite, atarashii chiryouhou ga kaihatsu saremashita.

examples.sentence: 法律に基づいて、犯罪者は逮捕されました。
examples.translation: The criminal was arrested according to the law.
examples.translationEn: The criminal was arrested according to the law.
examples.romaji: Houritsu ni motozuite, hanzaisha wa taiho saremashita.

examples.sentence: そのデータに基づいて、結論を出すことができます。
examples.translation: We can draw conclusions based on that data.
examples.translationEn: We can draw conclusions based on that data.
examples.romaji: Sono deeta ni motozuite, ketsuron o dasu koto ga dekimasu.

examples.sentence: お客様の要望に基づいて、商品の改善が行われます。
examples.translation: Product improvements will be made based on customer requests.
examples.translationEn: Product improvements will be made based on customer requests.
examples.romaji: Okyakusama no youbou ni motozuite, shouhin no kaizen ga okonawaremasu.

examples.sentence: 日本の文化に対して尊敬の念を持っています。
examples.translation: I have a sense of respect towards Japanese culture.
examples.translationEn: I have a sense of respect towards Japanese culture.
examples.romaji: Nihon no bunka ni taishite sonkei no nen wo motte imasu.

examples.sentence: 彼に対して無礼な態度を取らないでください。
examples.translation: Please don't have a rude attitude towards him.
examples.translationEn: Please don't have a rude attitude towards him.
examples.romaji: Kare ni taishite burei na taido wo toranaide kudasai.

examples.sentence: 先生の質問に対して、彼女はすぐに答えました。
examples.translation: In response to the teacher's question, she answered immediately.
examples.translationEn: In response to the teacher's question, she answered immediately.
examples.romaji: Sensei no shitsumon ni taishite, kanojo wa sugu ni kotaemashita.

examples.sentence: 男性に対して、女性は同じ仕事でも低い給料をもらっている。
examples.translation: In contrast to men, women receive lower salaries for the same job.
examples.translationEn: In contrast to men, women receive lower salaries for the same job.
examples.romaji: Dansei ni taishite, josei wa onaji shigoto demo hikui kyuuryou wo moratte iru.

examples.sentence: お客様の要望に応えて、新しいメニューを作りました。
examples.translation: Responding to the customers' requests, we created a new menu.
examples.translationEn: Responding to the customers' requests, we created a new menu.
examples.romaji: Okyaku-sama no youbou ni kotaete, atarashii menyuu o tsukurimashita.

examples.sentence: 彼はチームの期待に応えて素晴らしいプレーを見せた。
examples.translation: He lived up to the team's expectations and showed a great performance.
examples.translationEn: He lived up to the team's expectations and showed a great performance.
examples.romaji: Kare wa chiimu no kitai ni kotaete, subarashii puree o miseta.

examples.sentence: 政府は国民の声に応えて、新しい法律を制定した。
examples.translation: The government enacted a new law in response to the voice of the people.
examples.translationEn: The government enacted a new law in response to the voice of the people.
examples.romaji: Seifu wa kokumin no koe ni kotaete, atarashii houritsu o seitei shita.

examples.sentence: 企業は環境問題に応えて、環境に優しい製品を開発している。
examples.translation: Companies are developing environmentally friendly products in response to environmental issues.
examples.translationEn: Companies are developing environmentally friendly products in response to environmental issues.
examples.romaji: Kigyou wa kankyou mondai ni kotaete, kankyou ni yasashii seihin o kaihatsu shite iru.

examples.sentence: 仕事の量に応じて給料が変わります。
examples.translation: The salary changes depending on the amount of work.
examples.translationEn: The salary changes depending on the amount of work.
examples.romaji: Shigoto no ryou ni oujite kyuuryou ga kawarimasu.

examples.sentence: 季節に応じて服装を選びましょう。
examples.translation: Choose your clothes according to the season.
examples.translationEn: Choose your clothes according to the season.
examples.romaji: Kisetsu ni oujite fukusou wo erabimashou.

examples.sentence: お客様の希望に応じてプランを提案します。
examples.translation: We propose plans according to the customers' wishes.
examples.translationEn: We propose plans according to the customers' wishes.
examples.romaji: Okyakusama no kibou ni oujite puran wo teian shimasu.

examples.sentence: 年齢に応じて健康診断項目が異なります。
examples.translation: Health check items vary depending on age.
examples.translationEn: Health check items vary depending on age.
examples.romaji: Nenrei ni oujite kenkou shindan koumoku ga kotonarimasu.

examples.sentence: こんなに暑い日に運動したら、汗をかくに決まっている。
examples.translation: It's obvious that you'll sweat if you exercise on such a hot day.
examples.translationEn: It's obvious that you'll sweat if you exercise on such a hot day.
examples.romaji: Konna ni atsui hi ni undou shitara, ase wo kaku ni kimatte iru.

examples.sentence: 彼が試験に落ちたら、がっかりするに決まっている。
examples.translation: If he fails the exam, it's obvious he will be disappointed.
examples.translationEn: If he fails the exam, it's obvious he will be disappointed.
examples.romaji: Kare ga shiken ni ochitara, gakkari suru ni kimatte iru.

examples.sentence: 彼女はいつも遅れるから、今日も遅れるに決まっている。
examples.translation: She's always late, so it's obvious she'll be late today too.
examples.translationEn: She's always late, so it's obvious she'll be late today too.
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa itsumo okureru kara, kyou mo okureru ni kimatte iru.

examples.sentence: このゲームは楽しいに決まっている。
examples.translation: It's obvious that this game is fun.
examples.translationEn: It's obvious that this game is fun.
examples.romaji: Kono geemu wa tanoshii ni kimatte iru.

examples.sentence: 川に沿って歩いていくと、橋が見えてきます。
examples.translation: If you walk along the river, you will see a bridge.
examples.translationEn: If you walk along the river, you will see a bridge.
examples.romaji: Kawa ni sotte aruite iku to, hashi ga miete kimasu.

examples.sentence: このレシピに沿って料理を作れば、間違いありません。
examples.translation: If you cook according to this recipe, there will be no mistakes.
examples.translationEn: If you cook according to this recipe, there will be no mistakes.
examples.romaji: Kono reshipi ni sotte ryouri wo tsukureba, machigai arimasen.

examples.sentence: 規則に沿って行動しなければなりません。
examples.translation: We must act in accordance with the rules.
examples.translationEn: We must act in accordance with the rules.
examples.romaji: Kisoku ni sotte koudou shinakereba narimasen.

examples.sentence: 山道に沿って進むと、小さな神社があります。
examples.translation: If you follow the mountain path, there is a small shrine.
examples.translationEn: If you follow the mountain path, there is a small shrine.
examples.romaji: Yamamichi ni sotte susumu to, chiisana jinja ga arimasu.

examples.sentence: 彼の失敗はミスに過ぎない。
examples.translation: His failure is nothing more than a mistake.
examples.translationEn: His failure is nothing more than a mistake.
examples.romaji: Kare no shippai wa misu ni suginai.

examples.sentence: この試験は簡単な問題に過ぎない。
examples.translation: This test is nothing more than a simple question.
examples.translationEn: This test is nothing more than a simple question.
examples.romaji: Kono shiken wa kantan na mondai ni suginai.

examples.sentence: 彼女は友達に過ぎない。
examples.translation: She is nothing more than a friend.
examples.translationEn: She is nothing more than a friend.
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa tomodachi ni suginai.

examples.sentence: その発言は冗談に過ぎない。
examples.translation: That remark is nothing more than a joke.
examples.translationEn: That remark is nothing more than a joke.
examples.romaji: Sono hatsugen wa joudan ni suginai.
